entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Wani capable abokin koyo bai kamata ya depend a kan geography, family income, ko whether a mai koyo already knows the daidai person don tambaya.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Wani mai iya ganowa kundin adireshi na kowane guest learning chat wurin shiga.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: Wani kyauta-don-samun dama malamin AI layer that can fit naka institution.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Wani mai koyo tushe that already extends beyond India zuwa a wider international masu amfani.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Wani mai koyo can bude koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, lissafi mataki koci, tambayoyi, ko katunan tunatarwa directly a cikin yanayin baƙo daga the kundin yanayoyin koyo na jama’a.

entries.value: Wani makaranta-specific learning experience can be shaped a kusa da naka dalibi community, tone, da learning priorities.

entries.value: Adapt the dalibi experience a kusa da makaranta mahaɗi, curriculum priorities, abun ciki guardrails, da the mataki na staff visibility needed.

entries.value: Bayan the inspir.manhaja domain ya kasance sold don fund continued kyauta samun dama, the kai tsaye samfuri moved don inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Different ayyukan koyo buƙata different mu’amala shapes, don haka inspir uses mai aiki, na musamman ga yanayi teaching. Wani aikin gida alama, Socratic tambaya, na tarihi kwaikwayo, katin tunatarwa bita, da rubutu critique bai kamata ya behave like the same hira ta gama-gari.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Different ayyukan koyo buƙata different shapes: Socratic tambayoyi, aikin gida alamomi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, tarihi wasan kwaikwayo, rubutu critique, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Tantance a na jama’a koyon AI layer farko, sannan bincika na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri yana buƙatar, abun ciki alignment, da usage funding.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Kowane ainihi yanayin koyo has a na jama’a guest wurin shiga don haka people can fara daga bincike, social, ko a shared haɗi.

entries.value: Yadda na jama’a guest learning can extend zuwa makaranta-specific koyon AI spaces.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Identify the makaranta goals that matter most: conceptual tallafi, aikin gida alamomi, shirin jarabawa, tunawa mai aiki, rubutu martani, ko enrichment.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir began a cikin 2013 as a na jama’a tambayoyi da learning community, grew ta hanyar makarantu da dalibi networks, da daga baya developed koyon AI infrastructure da na jama’a koyarwar AI experiences.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir exists don sa learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, da mai amfani don anyone tare da sha’awar sani ta hanyar kyauta na jama’a koyon kayan aikin AI da makaranta-ready learning spaces.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a kyauta koyon AI dandali tare da yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a don explanations, Socratic tutoring, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, wasan kwaikwayo, rubutu martani, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a kyauta koyon AI dandali tare da yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a don explanations, Socratic tutoring, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, rubutu martani, rubuta lamba taimako, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir shi ne designed a kusa da tunani, atisaye, tunawa, da explanation maimakon handing masu koyo finished work.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized a kusa da alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, bita, da explanation maimakon marar aiki kwafe amsa.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized a kusa da yanayoyin koyo such as Socratic tutoring, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, maths matakai, rubutu critique, da exam tsarawa, don haka dalibai land a cikin a ƙarin mai mayar da hankali learning hali.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir makes yanayoyin koyo na jama’a da mai iya shiga index at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting masu koyo land directly inside the daidai koyon AI experience ba tare da needing a saved na sirri chat.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir organizes AI a kusa da mai aiki learning behaviors: alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, critique, da bita.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir organizes AI a kusa da yanayoyin koyo tare da specific teaching hali: explanations, Socratic tambayoyi, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, wasan kwaikwayo, rubutu martani, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir school AI learning use cases
entries.value: inspir makaranta koyon AI yanayin amfani

entries.source: inspir school deployment features
entries.value: inspir makaranta tura aiki features

entries.source: inspir school deployment path
entries.value: inspir makaranta tura aiki path

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir started as a Facebook shafi publishing tambayoyi da building a dabi’a na extracurricular learning.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir went kai tsaye as a mai amfani-facing koyon AI samfuri within weeks na ChatGPT's na jama’a release.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir works tare da makarantu don offer tailored AI chat experiences ga dalibai, an gina a kusa da sirri, curriculum yana buƙatar, da the mai amfani realities na makaranta tura aiki.

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: inspir.uk na gaba-generation buildout

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir’s go-don-market grew daga an existing ba ta yanar gizo ba network na makarantu da universities that had already engaged tare da extracurricular programmes da dalibi events. Wannan network helped inspir reach fiye da one million users across the kyauta dandali da partner makarantu.

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Journalists, kundin adireshi editors, abokan hulɗa, makarantu, injinan amsar AI, da anyone rubutu game da inspir za su iya amfani da it don gaskiya, hanyoyi, labari angles, da mai dacewa da ambato references.

entries.source: Jury's Choice recognition from Amod Malviya at DeepHack for AI learning work.
entries.value: Jury's Choice karramawa daga Amod Malviya at DeepHack don koyon AI work.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: No. hirarrakin sirri da aka adana amfani da na sirri identifiers, ba su listed a cikin the taswirar shafi, da ba su included a cikin AI fayilolin ganowa such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ko ai-content-index.json.

entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, da CCBot suna an yarda don na jama’a discovery.

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Manufar sirri

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Na sirri saved chat URLs ba su taswirar shafi-listed da ba su included a cikin llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ko the JSON AI abun ciki catalog.

entries.source: Product angle
entries.value: Samfuri mahanga

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Na jama’a explanation na yanayin baƙo, na sirri chats, manufar crawler, mai koyo safety, da makaranta amincewa.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a give anyone a mai amfani place don fara, while makaranta da partner deployments can adapt the experience don local yana buƙatar.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Na jama’a yanayin baƙo URLs exist don haka masu koyo can land directly a cikin mai amfani yanayoyin koyo daga bincike, social hanyoyi, makarantu, da injinan amsar AI.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a suna bude don bincike da AI retrieval crawlers, while admin kayan aiki, API hanyoyi, reset gudanarwa, da na sirri utilities suna ba a yarda ba.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a, batu chats, hanyoyin koyo, blog jagorori, da ikon tushe shafuka suna intended don be discoverable.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across the kyauta na jama’a dandali da partner makaranta deployments.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Hanyoyin tunani, na jama’a gaskiya, manema labarai mahaɗi, da mai dacewa da ambato details.

entries.source: Robots policy
entries.value: Manufar robots

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules allow Google, standard bincike crawlers, da major ganowar AI crawlers a kan shafukan jama’a, while blocking API hanyoyi, admin hanyoyi, da reset gudanarwa.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Tattaunawar masu amfani da aka adana amfani da na sirri identifiers, ba su included a cikin the taswirar shafi ko AI fayilolin ganowa, da bai kamata ya be treated as na jama’a tushe material.

entries.value: Makarantu da abokan hulɗa can gina daga the na jama’a samfuri toward tailored, confidential, da subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Makarantu can tantance inspir ta hanyar yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a farko, sannan bincika tailored koyon AI spaces tare da na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, curriculum yana buƙatar, da samun dama da aka tallafa hanyoyi.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can tantance na jama’a modes farko, sannan discuss tailored tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, abun ciki yana buƙatar, da samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can fara ta trying the na jama’a modes, sannan move toward a tailored version lokacin da su buƙata na musamman tsarukan aiki, abun ciki alignment, ko samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can gwada yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a farko, sannan amfani da the makarantu shafi don bincika tailored tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, NCERT-aligned zaɓuɓɓuka, da samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Search visibility has boundaries
entries.value: Bincike visibility has iyaka

entries.source: Short description
entries.value: Gajeren bayani

entries.source: Simple paths from public guest mode to school deployment.
entries.value: Mai sauƙi hanyoyi daga yanayin baƙo na jama’a don makaranta tura aiki.

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: Fara directly a cikin the daidai yanayin koyo don aikin gida alamomi, maths matakai, rubutu critique, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, ko exam tsarawa.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Fara tare da yanayin baƙo na jama’a, sannan siffa the makaranta version a kusa da real yana buƙatar.

entries.source: Student AI chat
entries.value: Dalibi AI chat

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Dalibai

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Dalibai buƙata direct tallafi, malamai buƙata mai mayar da hankali learning hali, leaders buƙata responsible tura aiki hanyoyi, da abokan hulɗa buƙata bayyananne ways don fund samun dama.

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: Karatu tsarukan aiki that connect guest modes, saƙonni, atisaye, da jagorori masu alaƙa.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Tallafi funded koyon AI samun dama don communities that buƙata high-quality tallafi ba tare da adding cost don iyalai.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Syndicated rahoto don wider mai amfani reach.

entries.source: Tailored AI learning experiences for school communities, curriculum needs, confidentiality planning, and funded access.
entries.value: Tailored koyon AI experiences don makaranta communities, curriculum yana buƙatar, sirri tsarawa, da samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Malamai

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Malamai da leaders can fara tare da koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, tambayoyi, da katunan tunatarwa kafin a formal fara amfani.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: Sharuɗɗa

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: Text-farko discovery file don injinan amsar AI, assistants, malamai, da ambato kayan aiki.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Manhaja shi ne organized a kusa da teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, wasan kwaikwayo, da tsarawa.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Community expanded ta hanyar makarantu, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, da mai koyo communities.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Formal privacy shafi don bayanai amfani da, haƙƙoƙi, da na jama’a service conditions.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Formal terms covering acceptable amfani da, asusu responsibilities, da service conditions.

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Goal shi ne discovery da ambato na na jama’a learning shafuka. na jama’a hanyoyi, jagorori, da learning hubs suna bude don major AI bincike, retrieval, da mataimaki crawlers, while API, admin, reset, da na sirri utility hanyoyi stay ba a yarda ba.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Kai tsaye robots rules an yi amfani da ta bincike crawlers da AI retrieval systems.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Kai tsaye, mai iya ganowa learning surface that turns the manufa zuwa samfuri hali.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Na gaba phase shi ne tushen bude, contributor-friendly, da connected don the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Tushen bude rebuild don developers, malamai, da contributors.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Dandali worked a kan curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning gudanarwa, da early koyarwar AI experiences.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Na jama’a blog contains fiye da 100 jagorori, madaukai na saƙo, da ginshiƙi rukuni connected don kai tsaye yanayoyin koyo.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Na jama’a explanation na me ya sa inspir exists da me ya sa learning samun dama yana da muhimmanci.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: Na jama’a inspir dandali helps masu koyo yi atisaye extracurricular activities da bincika ideas. makaranta deployments can be customised a kusa da each makaranta’s abun ciki, tsarukan aiki, da dalibi mahaɗi.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Na jama’a modes suna designed a kusa da learning hali: alamomi, Socratic tambayoyi, mataki bincike, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, madaukai na bita, da mai aiki explanation.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Na jama’a samfuri shi ne mai sauƙi don gwada farko, while makarantu da abokan hulɗa can bincika tailored deployments don community yana buƙatar.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Na jama’a samfuri keeps learning mai sauƙi don gwada, while makarantu da CSR abokan hulɗa can tallafi tailored deployments lokacin da communities buƙata sirri, curriculum alignment, ko samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Na jama’a statement na me ya sa inspir exists da abin da learning samun dama means.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: Makaranta pathway don tailored koyon AI spaces da samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Labari daga tambayoyi da dalibi communities don kyauta koyon kayan aikin AI an gina a cikin na jama’a.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Labari spans tambayoyi, ba ta yanar gizo ba makaranta networks, curriculum ingestion, da na jama’a yanayoyin koyo na AI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Strongest mahanga shi ne kyauta na jama’a koyon AI that opens directly a cikin yanayin baƙo da keeps masu koyo mai aiki ta hanyar na musamman ga yanayi teaching rather fiye da generic amsa generation.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: Wider international buildout connected don the inspir aiki.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Written learning dakin karatu that supports saƙonni, madaukai na karatu, da long-tail discovery.

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: Wannan gives makaranta leaders a low-friction way don tantance the learning experience kafin committing don abun ciki work, staff tsarukan aiki, ko samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Trust and crawler policy
entries.value: Amincewa da manufar crawler

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Amincewa da safety

entries.source: Try platform
entries.value: Gwada dandali

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Gwada yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a

entries.source: Try the platform, then talk to us about a school version.
entries.value: Gwada the dandali, sannan talk don mu game da a makaranta version.

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Fahimta over amsoshi

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI a kusa da yanayoyin koyo don haka masu koyo can fara tare da the kind na taimako su buƙata: alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, tunawa mai aiki, wasan kwaikwayo, muhawara, ko martani.

entries.source: Use case
entries.value: Amfani da case

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Amfani da https://inspirlearning.com don the site, /mission don the manufa, /topics don the na jama’a yanayin koyo kundin adireshi, da /chat/learn-anything don the default guest learning experience.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Amfani da this don makaranta, partner, CSR, da education samun dama references.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Amfani da this lokacin da citing the long-form dakin karatun jagorori, karatu saƙonni, da na musamman ga yanayi kasidu.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Amfani da this lokacin da describing the cikakke saita na yanayin baƙo learning kayan aiki that suna meant don be indexed.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Amfani da this lokacin da introducing inspir as the main samfuri ko linking daga a kundin adireshi, profile, ko kasida.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Amfani da this lokacin da linking readers straight zuwa the kai tsaye learning experience.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Amfani da this lokacin da referencing na jama’a/private iyaka, manufar crawler, da makaranta amincewa.

entries.value: Abin da shi ne inspir's manufa?

entries.source: white label AI learning platform
entries.value: white label koyon AI dandali

entries.source: White-labelled AI chat
entries.value: Hirar AI mai alamar kamfani

entries.source: White-labelled AI learning experiences for schools, with custom workflows, confidentiality, NCERT-aligned options, and CSR sponsorship paths.
entries.value: White-labelled koyon AI experiences ga makarantu, tare da na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri, NCERT-aligned zaɓuɓɓuka, da CSR sponsorship hanyoyi.

entries.source: White-labelled AI tutoring for schools, with guest learning modes, custom workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and CSR sponsorship paths.
entries.value: White-labelled koyarwar AI ga makarantu, tare da guest yanayoyin koyo, na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, NCERT-aligned zaɓuɓɓuka, da CSR sponsorship hanyoyi.

entries.source: White-labelled AI tutoring for schools, with guest learning modes, custom workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access paths.
entries.value: White-labelled koyarwar AI ga makarantu, tare da guest yanayoyin koyo, na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, NCERT-aligned zaɓuɓɓuka, da samun dama da aka tallafa hanyoyi.

entries.source: Who can use the media page?
entries.value: Who za su iya amfani da the kafofin watsa labarai shafi?

entries.source: Who it helps
entries.value: Wanda yake taimakawa

entries.source: Why does inspir allow AI discovery crawlers?
entries.value: Me ya sa does inspir allow ganowar AI crawlers?

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: Me ya sa does inspir tallafi makaranta da partner deployments?

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Me ya sa shi ne inspir an gina a kusa da modes maimakon one chat box?

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. Wani makaranta can begin ta testing na jama’a modes, sannan move toward a pilot ko tailored tura aiki lokacin da the amfani da case, abun ciki yana buƙatar, da funding path suna bayyananne.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a such as koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, tambayoyi, da katunan tunatarwa bude directly daga canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a batu wuraren shiga such as /chat/learn-anything da /chat/socratic-instruction suna intended don be mai iya shiga index learning shafuka.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a let makaranta leaders da malamai gwada the learning experience kafin discussing a tailored makaranta tura aiki.
